item.title: Version 1.5.5
item.description:
Retext 1.5.5

What's New in v1.5.5

Bug Fixes

  • Intel Mac Support Fixed — Now builds as a verified Universal Binary (arm64 + x86_64)
    • ---

    What's New in v1.5.4

    Bug Fixes

  • Intel Mac Support — App now builds as a Universal Binary for both Apple Silicon and Intel Macs
  • AI Generation Fixed — Updated to latest Claude model
    • ---

    What's New in v1.5.3

    Improvements

  • Stability improvements — Minor fixes and performance tuning
    • ---

    What's New in v1.5.2

    Improvements

  • Auto-Updates Fixed — Resolved update issues on macOS 26
    • ---

    What's New in v1.5.1

    Improvements

  • UI Enhancements — Minor polish and performance improvements
    • ---

    What's New in v1.5.0

    New

  • Analytics Consent — Choose whether to share anonymous usage data on first launch
  • Update Notifications — Subtle in-app banner when a new version is available
    • ---

    What's New in v1.4.9

    Bug Fixes

  • Free AI Trial Fixed — Automatically retries with free trial when stale authentication prevents generation
    • ---

    What's New in v1.4.8

    Bug Fixes

  • Free AI Trial Fixed — Properly clears stale authentication from previous installations so free trial works on all machines
    • ---

    What's New in v1.4.7

    Bug Fixes

  • Free AI Trial Fixed — Free AI generation now works on all machines, including those with previous Retext installations
    • ---

    What's New in v1.4.6

    Bug Fixes

  • Free AI Trial Fixed — Free AI generation now works reliably on all machines
    • ---

    What's New in v1.4.5

    New

  • Send Feedback — Share feedback and feature requests directly from Settings
  • Updated Pricing — Pro now starts at $4.99/month
    • ---

    What's New in v1.4.4

    New

  • Try AI Free — Free users get 1 complimentary AI generation to experience the feature
    • ---

    What's New in v1.4.3

    Improvements

  • More Free Snippets — Free tier now includes 5 snippets (up from 3)
  • Snippet Counter — See how many snippets you've used at a glance
    • ---

    What's New in v1.4.1

    Improvements

  • License Status — Toolbar badge now updates immediately when license state changes
  • Expired License Notice — Clear notification when your license has expired, with a Renew button
    • ---

    What's New in v1.4.0

    Teams & Collaboration

  • Team Snippets — Create a team, invite members, and share snippets across your organization
  • Seat-Based Plans — Starter (5 seats), Pro (15 seats), and Business (50 seats) tiers with monthly and yearly billing
  • Real-Time Sync — Team snippets sync automatically with 30-second polling
  • Offline Support — Team snippets cached locally in SQLite so they work without internet
  • Conflict Resolution — Smart handling when two members edit the same snippet
  • Role-Based Permissions — Owner, admin, and member roles with appropriate access controls

    • Authentication

  • Google Sign-In — Sign in with your Google account to access team features
  • Secure Tokens — JWT-based authentication with automatic token refresh

    • UI Improvements

  • Team Selector — Switch between personal and team snippet libraries from the sidebar
  • Sync Status — See sync status in the sidebar header
  • Native Toolbar — Cleaner toolbar with system-style buttons
  • Updated Logo — New branding in link previews and Open Graph images

    • Website

  • Prompt Library — 2,467 curated prompts for programmatic SEO pages
  • Beta Page — Hidden /beta page for early adopter testing
    • ---

    What's New in v1.3.5

    Bug Fixes

  • Window Resize Fixed — Resize cursors now appear correctly when hovering window edges
    • ---

    v1.3.4

    Improvements

  • Improved Edit View — Cleaner layout with tags inline, no scrolling required
  • Better Title Input — Titles now enforce max length as you type
  • Clearer Read-Only View — Content displays without input-style background
    • ---

    v1.3.3

    Improvements

  • Better License Activation — License key entry is now at the top of the upgrade window, no scrolling needed
    • ---

    v1.3.2

    Improvements

  • Clearer Upgrade Messaging — Updated in-app Pro upgrade prompts with benefit-focused copy
    • ---

    v1.3.1

    Bug Fixes

  • Fixed Checkout Links — Updated all purchase/upgrade links to the correct checkout page
    • ---

    v1.3.0

    New Branded App Icon

  • Fresh Look — New green logo with white "R" matches the retext.io website
  • Better Recognition — Stand out in your Dock and app switcher

    • Enhanced About Window

  • Credits — Retext menu → About Retext now shows tagline and website link
  • Copyright — Displays "© 2024-2026 Retext. All rights reserved."

    • Snippet Settings

  • Max Title Length — Set your preferred limit (10-40 characters) in Settings
  • Auto-Remove Spaces — Spaces are automatically stripped from titles (toggle in Settings)
  • Cleaner Titles — Semicolons are automatically removed from titles

    • Improved Validation

  • Instant Feedback — Errors and warnings now appear directly under the title as you type
  • Conflict Prevention — Can't create triggers that would conflict (e.g., "em" and "email")
  • Helpful Suggestions — When blocked, see alternative trigger names you can use
  • Friendlier Messages — Shorter, clearer error messages

    • Better Editing Experience

  • Type Triggers Freely — Snippet expansion is disabled when editing in Retext
  • No Accidental Triggers — Type `;hello` in your content without it expanding
    • ---

    Previous Releases

    v1.2.x — Automatic Updates

  • Automatic update notifications on app launch

    • v1.1.x — Tag-Based Organization

  • New three-panel layout with tags sidebar
  • Add tags to snippets for organization
  • Filter snippets by tag

    • v1.0.x — Initial Release

  • NavigationSplitView layout with sidebar
  • Tinted button styles and hover effects
  • Infinite loop prevention and snippet validation
  • Keyboard shortcuts: ⌘E to edit, ⌘↩ to save, Esc to cancel
